# services.klipper

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.klipper`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.klipper.apiSocket` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the API socket to create. |
| `services.klipper.configDir` | `absolute path` | Path to Klipper config file. |
| `services.klipper.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to default Klipper config. |
| `services.klipper.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Klipper, the 3D printer firmware. |
| `services.klipper.extraSettings` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra lines to append to the generated Klipper configuration. |
| `services.klipper.firmwares` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Firmwares Klipper should manage |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.canbusNetwork` | `null or string` | CAN bus network this mcu is connected to. Defaults to can0 if canbus_uuid is set. |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.canbus_uuid` | `null or string` | CAN bus uuid of this mcu. Derived from `service.klipper.settings` by default. |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to firmware config which is generated using `klipper-genconf` |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable building of firmware for manual flashing . |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.enableKlipperFlash` | `boolean` | Whether to enable flashings scripts for firmware. This will add `klipper-flash-$mcu` scripts to your environment which can be called to flash the firmware. Please check the configs at [klipper](https://github.com/Klipper3d/klipper/tree/master/config) whether your board supports flashing via `make flash` . |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.klipperFlashPackage` | `null or package` | Path to the built klipper-flash package. |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.package` | `null or package` | Path to the built firmware package. |
| `services.klipper.firmwares.<name>.serial` | `null or absolute path` | Path to serial port this mcu is connected to. Derived from `service.klipper.settings` by default. |
| `services.klipper.group` | `null or string` | Group account under which Klipper runs. If null is specified (default), a temporary user will be created by systemd. |
| `services.klipper.inputTTY` | `absolute path` | Path of the virtual printer symlink to create. |
| `services.klipper.logFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the file Klipper should log to. If `null`, it logs to stdout, which is not recommended by upstream. |
| `services.klipper.mutableConfig` | `boolean` | Whether to manage the config outside of NixOS. It will still be initialized with the defined NixOS config if the file doesn't already exist. |
| `services.klipper.octoprintIntegration` | `boolean` | Allows Octoprint to control Klipper. |
| `services.klipper.package` | `package` | The klipper package to use. |
| `services.klipper.settings` | `null or (attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them))` | Configuration for Klipper. See the [documentation](https://www.klipper3d.org/Overview.html#configuration-and-tuning-guides) for supported values. |
| `services.klipper.user` | `null or string` | User account under which Klipper runs. If null is specified (default), a temporary user will be created by systemd. |
